# owloop Brand System

## Mascot
Ollie — a nocturnal owl who codes while you sleep.

## Voice
Calm, reliable, slightly whimsical; never hyper or corporate.

## Color palette
| Token | Hex | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| Night | `#0b1026` | background (TUI), `#080c1d` (landing page) |
| Dim Blue | `#3a4270` | secondary borders, panel frames |
| Amber | `#d4a025` | primary accent, headings, owl body |
| Amber Bright | `#f0c563` | hover states, terminal commands |
| Moon White | `#f2ecd8` | body text on dark |
| Green | `#8fd19e` | positive states, success |
| Red | `#e0777d` | warnings, errors, danger |
| Gray | `#8890b3` | muted text, dim labels |
| Cyan | `#8fb8de` | model info, secondary data |

## Typography
- Display / UI: Space Grotesk (geometric, slightly quirky — matches the owl personality)
- Code: JetBrains Mono / system monospace

## Imagery
Night sky, moon phases, owl silhouette, infinite loop (∞).
